case_title: JAKE JIMENEZ VS. J. YO WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO YICK-ON WONG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-04-2015 AT 3:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-30-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST YICK-ON WONG IS NOT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-05-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED IN ERROR BY CLERK. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-10-15 At 10:15 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance by Appellant/Defendant J. Yo Wong; appearing for Respondent/Plaintiff Jake Jimenez present in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly as assigned by the Presiding Judge Dept. for Small Claims Appeal/Trial De Novo.
The Court reviews the case file and takes testimony from Mr. Jimenez.
After hearing and considering the testimony and evidence presented, the court affirms the
Judgement, granted Respondent/Plaintiff Jake Jimenez a judgement in principal amount of $1992.79; costs $237.50. Judgement on appeal is final and case is remanded back to Small Claims Court. (Respondent/Plaintiff's exhibits retained by the court)

Dept. 306 Judge Richard Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.
